extract: Dark Pulse (Japanese: あくのはどう Evil Pulse) is a damage-dealing Dark-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM79 in Generation IV and Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM97 from Generation VI to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TM20 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR58 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM094 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM090 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
